products.name: Stalker Block 30
products.descriptor: fixed-wing small UAS for long-endurance ISR and reconnaissance

evidence.snippet:
### LR/LE
Redwire has been awarded a follow-on contract with the United States Navy Marine Corps Small Tactical Unmanned Aircraft Systems Program (PMA-263) for delivery of the VXE30 Stalker Small Uncrewed Aircraft System (sUAS) to support the Long Range/Long Endurance (LR/LE) program of record. Fulfillment of this order will bring the program’s total VXE30 Stalker fleet to over 200 aircraft.

Our Octopus gimbal solutions deliver the intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance that drives mission success. Our optronic surveillance systems are developed for either crewed or uncrewed systems and offer robust capabilities – no matter the mission or vehicle.

products.name: GN&C Components & Avionics
products.descriptor: spacecraft guidance, navigation and control components including sun sensors, star trackers, and cameras

evidence.snippet:
GN&C Components/Avionics
========================
GN&C Components and Avionics
----------------------------
For over 50 years, Redwire has been a trusted supplier of guidance, navigation, and control (GN&C) systems for spacecraft and satellites.

products.name: Mako
products.descriptor: high-agility rad-hard GEO/MEO spacecraft platform for precision RPO missions

evidence.snippet:
High Agility GEO/MEO Platform
-----------------------------
Mako is a high-speed, high-maneuverability, rad-hard vetted platform designed and built in the United States for precision RPO missions and equipped with docking provisions. Mako accommodates a wide variety of payloads, and offers cutting-edge innovations, including precision pointing, autonomy, and software-defined and AI/ML capabilities.
OVERVIEW

products.name: SabreSat
products.descriptor: modular VLEO orbital satellite platform for ISR, communications, and navigation constellations

evidence.snippet:
A New Breed of Satellite
------------------------
Whether your mission requires persistent, high-resolution imagery or resilient communications, Redwire’s highly flexible SabreSat VLEO platform delivers.
Built in the United States and designed for performance, endurance, and cost-effectiveness, SabreSat can be produced in volume to meet the needs of large constellations.
OVERVIEW

products.name: Thresher
products.descriptor: tactically responsive LEO spacecraft platform for surveillance and space domain awareness

evidence.snippet:
Tactically Responsive LEO Platform
----------------------------------
Designed and built in the United States, Thresher delivers versatility, cost-effectiveness, and tactical responsiveness in contested environments, serving missions from surveillance to space domain awareness and TacRS.
OVERVIEW
